appmesh.route.routespec.GrpcRoute.Docs: An object that represents the specification of a gRPC route.

appmesh.route.routespec.Http2Route.Docs: An object that represents the specification of an HTTP/2 route.

appmesh.route.routespec.HttpRoute.Docs: An object that represents the specification of an HTTP route.

appmesh.route.routespec.Priority.Docs: The priority for the route. Routes are matched based on the specified value, where 0 is the highest priority.

appmesh.route.routespec.TcpRoute.Docs: An object that represents the specification of a TCP route.
